misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: Marcus, representing Kurk Golf, stands as a singular testament to enduring dedication within the Hector Trophée. The forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will mark his thirteenth consecutive appearance, an extraordinary record of participation that has seen him compete in every single iteration of this esteemed pair competition since its very beginning.

Across his twelve prior engagements, Marcus has diligently navigated the demanding formats of both individual and team play. Despite his steadfast commitment and consistent presence on the greens, the ultimate accolades — the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair and the prestigious Victor Trophy for individual supremacy — have, to date, remained just beyond his grasp. His journey is thus defined by an unwavering pursuit of these elusive triumphs.

Beyond his competitive drive, Marcus presents a uniquely compelling narrative rooted in his personal journey with gender identity. He has, on occasion, participated in events under the distinct persona of his female alter-ego, "Eva," a profound and distinctive expression of his identity that adds a unique dimension to his presence within the Hector events community.

As Marcus prepares for his thirteenth challenge, his continued active involvement in Hector events solidifies his status as a persistent and respected contender. Spectators and fellow players alike will observe with keen interest as he endeavors to transform his consistent participation into a long-awaited championship victory in this distinguished tournament.
